arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher claims Trent Alexander-Arnold can delay Real Madrid decision beyond 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to step up their transfer push for Trent Alexander-Arnold at the start of 2025. Alexander-Arnold is out of contract at Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 season with talks on an extension ongoing. arts.ttl: Everton invite teenage Australian fan to training ground after derby trip ruined
arts.sum: Mackenzie Kinsella, 15, had travelled from Australia to watch Saturday’s game against Liverpool but Storm Darragh forced the game to be postponed.

arts.ttl: Report: Latest update has emerged on Mohamed Salah’s contract talks at Liverpool
arts.sum: Apart from recognition for their brilliant form this season, most of the talk surrounding Liverpool this season is about the contract situation of their players. The Reds are currently involved in contract talks with three of their most important players; Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold. arts.ttl: Liverpool 'one of nine clubs' tracking 21-goal winger who could replace Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are one of nine teams who are running the rule over LA Galaxy winger Gabriel Pec, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man City plot stunning Liverpool raid for free agent superstar
arts.sum: Manchester City have 'already opened talks' with Trent Alexander-Arnold, according to a sensational report. According to an eyebrow-raising report from CaughtOffside, Liverpool's bitter Premier League rivals Man City are also in the mix.
